# Frontmatter Test

This document has YAML frontmatter metadata at the top.

## Section 1

The frontmatter should be displayed in a collapsible block with syntax highlighting, not as raw text in the document body.

## Section 2

The table of contents should only show headings from the main content, not from the frontmatter.
